name: ASPAC II Acquisition Corp.
summary: part I Introduction A SPAC II Acquisition Corp. (the Company) is a blank check company incorporated in the British Virgin Islands as a BVI business company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses.
